message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
skinparam packageStyle rectangle

title PDQm Implementation grouped as a façade

participant "Patient\nDemographics\nConsumer" as Consumer1
package "PDQm Implementation\ngrouped as a façade" {
    participant "Patient\nDemographics\nSupplier" as Supplier1
    participant "Patient\nDemographics\nConsumer" as Consumer2
}
participant "Patient\nDemographics\nSupplier" as Supplier2

Consumer1 -> Supplier1: Mobile Patient Demographics Query [ITI-78]
activate Supplier1
activate Consumer1

Supplier1 -[dotted]-> Consumer2: Internal processing
activate Consumer2

Consumer2 -> Supplier2: Patient Demographics Query [ITI-21]\nor Patient Demographics Query for HL7v3 [ITI-47]
activate Supplier2

Supplier2 --> Consumer2: [ITI-21] or [ITI-47] Response
deactivate Supplier2

Consumer2 -[dotted]-> Supplier1: Internal processing
deactivate Consumer2

Supplier1 --> Consumer1: [ITI-78] Response
deactivate Supplier1
deactivate Consumer1

@enduml
```
